1 in 1st digit = Tier 7 
1 in 2nd digit = Tier 1 
1 in 3rd digit = Tier 2 
1 in 4th digit = Tier 3 
1 in 5th digit = Tier 4 
1 in 6th digit = Tier 5 
1 in 7th digit = Tier 6 

COMMENT: The CCW constructs the plan characteristics file from information submitted by plan sponsors to 
CMS’s Health Plan Management System (HPMS). 

Employer and National Program of All-inclusive Care for the Elderly (PACE) plans are waived from 
reporting plan benefit package information.
